title: Gram-Schmidt Orthogonalization Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step procedure for transforming a set of linearly independent vectors into an orthogonal set
elements: Start with linearly independent vectors v₁, v₂, ..., vₙ
Calculate projection of v₂ onto u₁
Subtract projection from v₂ to get u₂
Result: orthogonal basis u₁, u₂, ..., uₙ
relationships: Each step removes components parallel to previous orthogonal vectors
